_description: Categorized manipulative posts for testing detection

fear-appeal.text: If you don't act NOW, your children will suffer IRREVERSIBLE damage. The clock is ticking.
Scientists warn we have LESS THAN 5 YEARS before total collapse. Are you prepared?

shame-attack.text: You're DISGUSTING if you don't have a beach body by summer. NO EXCUSES.
Any parent who lets their kid eat fast food doesn't actually love their children.

anger-trigger.text: These TRAITORS in government are DESTROYING everything our grandparents built. Wake up people!
They don't care about you. They never did. And they're LAUGHING while you struggle.

false-urgency.text: LAST CHANCE: Only 2 spots left! If you don't sign up in the next 30 minutes you'll miss out FOREVER.
This offer expires at MIDNIGHT. Don't be the one who missed out.

combined.text: You're a TERRIBLE person if you don't share this NOW. Children are DYING and you're scrolling past. EVERYONE else cares. What's wrong with YOU?
